{{Quote|An interdictor. Excellent. Nothing will escape the Ciutric system.|Delak Krennel upon receiving the ''Binder''|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]]</ref>}}
'''''Binder''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer]] given to the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]] by [[Ysanne Isard]] for use in the [[evacuation of Ciutric]]. Its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] was [[Phulik]].

==History==
The ''Binder'' was severely damaged by [[Aggressor Wing]] during the battle, but was later repaired and served in the fleet of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]], when the self-proclaimed "[[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]]" took control of the region. In the [[Battle of Ciutric]], the ''Binder'' surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after Krennel was killed and his flagship [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']] was destroyed. When the Hegemony entered the New Republic, the ship and its crew were integrated into its defense force and remained at [[Ciutric IV]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Binder'' makes an appearance in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' as a [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar]] [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]]. The ship's name is listed to appear randomly when the player uses one of these ships during gameplay.

{{Ship-stub}}
